problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: AI-Powered Tender Intelligence System for Automated Eligibility Evaluation and Explainable Procurement Decisions
summary: Design a technical platform that automates the end-to-end process of tender understanding, bidder analysis, and eligibility evaluation while ensuring full explainability and human oversight.
key_steps: Mapping extracted bidder data against tender criteria
optimization_claims: Transforms government procurement by making it faster, transparent, consistent, fully auditable
